senior_discount.notes: N.J.S.A. 18A:64A-26.1 — NJ residents 65+ may enroll tuition-free on space-available basis at county colleges. Fees may apply.

steps: Complete an admissions application at atlantic.edu
Contact the Registrar's Office about audit enrollment
Register for the course during the enrollment period
Senior tuition waiver applicants (65+) must provide proof of age and NJ residency
application_process.timing: Register during the normal enrollment period

restrictions: Instructor approval may be required for audit enrollment
Audit students do not receive grades or academic credit
Space availability may limit audit enrollment
Financial aid does not cover audited courses
